verification_gate: Acceptance traces authority, task graph, implementation, proof, release, outcome, rollback, and learning with no paper completion or external mutation during planning.

gate_result.eight_flow_stages_plus_two_invariants: A-H trace stages + I/J cross-cutting invariants
gate_result.single_durable_writer: PostgreSQL + RuVector (every macro-state stage: authority A, task graph B, proof D, promoted learning H)

traces_authority.owner: David (final authority) via LifeOS Governance Agent / CECCA
traces_authority.store_authority: durable relational macro-state -> PostgreSQL + RuVector (STORE-001 class 1)
traces_authority.no_self_authorization: CECCA single internal CEO-agent boundary (DECIDE-006); COMPANY-001 gate 'no agent can self-authorize'
traces_authority.evidence: signed authority + provenance row in PostgreSQL; recovery = PITR
traces_authority.rollback: revoke the authority record; no downstream stage proceeds

traces_task_graph.store_authority: task rows -> PostgreSQL class 1; causal dependency edges -> PostgreSQL + RuVector GNN class 2 (No-Sidecar native extension)
traces_task_graph.bounded: each child bounded and proof-bearing; simulation_required = TRUE before any execution child (LIFEOS-003 gate)
traces_task_graph.evidence: task-graph rows + causal edges in PostgreSQL; recovery = PITR + reproducible edge re-derivation
traces_task_graph.rollback: restore prior task graph; no execution-plane source changed

traces_implementation.store_authority: code AST/rows -> PostgreSQL canonical (class 1); edit thoughts/traces -> redb transient (class 3)
traces_implementation.ingestion_path: Nushell parser -> nu_plugin CodeDB -> redb buffer -> envctl embed bridge (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) -> PostgreSQL; COW staging branch isolates the edit
traces_implementation.sync_edge: forward-only redb -> envctl -> PostgreSQL; no dual-write
traces_implementation.evidence: staged code rows + green local-first verification (bun run test / cargo test --workspace --locked) before merge
traces_implementation.rollback: discard the COW staging branch; redb transient by definition; no repository mutation

traces_proof.store_authority: durable proof/provenance -> PostgreSQL canonical (class 1); SHA-256 content identity + SHAKE256 Cryptographic Witness Chain rooted in PostgreSQL source vectors
traces_proof.anti_bluffing: RuVector MinCut severs a drifting agent; Causal-Graph verification rejects any claim without a historical root
traces_proof.no_paper_completion_here: status 'pass' requires a populated gate_result, never self-declared
traces_proof.evidence: proof-record row + witness chain + CI receipt; recovery = PITR + re-verification
traces_proof.rollback: mark proof failed; MinCut isolates the agent; no promotion without a green proof

traces_release.store_authority: derived projection (materialized source dir / release tree) -> envctl read-only projection FROM PostgreSQL (STORE-001 class 5, derived/disposable)
traces_release.projection_path: PostgreSQL production branch -> module_path directory mapping -> concatenate raw_code -> dump clean tree -> Nix musl static (x86_64-unknown-linux-musl) install-in-place binary
traces_release.provenance: release manifest carries SHA-256 identity + source commit/PR lineage; built only from a green-proof branch
traces_release.evidence: release provenance manifest; recovery = deterministic re-projection from PostgreSQL
traces_release.rollback: discard projected tree + artifact; re-project prior production branch; no published/production release during planning

traces_outcome.owner: LifeOS Governance / QA Agent + Runtime Kernel
traces_outcome.store_authority: transient operating traces/telemetry -> redb (class 3, scratchpad/WAL); settled significant outcome -> PostgreSQL canonical via envctl forward flush
traces_outcome.sync_edge: redb -> envctl flush -> PostgreSQL (only significant states persist); LifeOS UI reads live redb via UDS
traces_outcome.evidence: observed-outcome row in PostgreSQL + concrete runtime signal (e.g. db_health status + applied_migrations); recovery = redb local disk (live) + PITR (settled)
traces_outcome.rollback: transient telemetry expires; PITR restore on regression; no production mutation during planning

traces_rollback.store_authority: recovery per STORE-001 — PostgreSQL PITR (classes 1/2), redb local disk (class 3), envctl re-projection (class 5), archived plan (planning)
traces_rollback.verified_cutover_invariant: a class leaves redb-durable only after a green live BlobStore SHA-256 parity run (STORE-001 invariant); never an unverified swap; no dual-write
traces_rollback.evidence: named rollback command per stage; zero unarchived destructive actions (PRESERVE-001 discipline)
traces_rollback.rollback: restore the archived acceptance plan; company, repository, and production state unchanged

traces_learning.store_authority: per-agent cognition (SONA/MicroLoRA) -> AgentDB (.rvf) non-authoritative (class 4); promoted next-action row -> PostgreSQL canonical (class 1) ONLY from proven state
traces_learning.promotion_rule: LIFEOS-005 'promotion of proven state only'; promotion witnessed by SHAKE256 chain rooted in PostgreSQL source vectors; a failed/unproven stage promotes no learning
traces_learning.evidence: next_action row derived from a green proof (traceable to COMPANY-002-D); recovery = regenerable .rvf + PITR
traces_learning.rollback: revert the promoted next-action row; AgentDB cognition regenerable; base model + knowledge graph unchanged

no_paper_completion.rule: no stage self-declares completion; each of A-H names concrete recoverable evidence (authority row, task rows + causal edges, verification receipt, proof-record + witness chain, provenance manifest, outcome row, rollback command, proof-derived next-action)
no_paper_completion.traces_to: AGENTS.md 'never mark done without completion evidence' + STORE-001 'verified cutover, never by assumption'

no_external_mutation_during_planning.secrets_class_unchanged: external-secret/provenance authority stays in OS keyring + committed pins (STORE-001 class 6)
no_external_mutation_during_planning.live_tiers_written: none (no PostgreSQL, redb, AgentDB, repository, CI, or production runtime write)

gate_result.store_001_alignment: store-aligned: each stage lands in exactly one STORE-001 class; PostgreSQL + RuVector is the sole durable writer of every macro-state stage; redb/envctl/nu_plugin CodeDB/AgentDB keep their intended non-durable roles; the reference-instance cutover moves off redb-durable only via the verified BlobStore SHA-256 parity contract; no second durable writer, no silent reclassification
gate_result.reference_instance_grounded_in: STORE-001 (store_relationship_decision.json), ADOPT-001 (adopted_capabilities.source.csv: PgStore parity, SHA-256 identity, envctl export contract, exact-byte materialization), Architecture Blueprint ingestion/materialization/anti-bluffing

proof_summary: COMPANY-002 defines the company-and-development vertical acceptance plan as planning artifacts only. The task family generated/task_families/COMPANY-002.json enumerates 10 work items: the eight acceptance-flow stages the gate names (A authority, B task graph, C implementation, D proof, E release, F outcome, G rollback, H learning) plus two cross-cutting invariants (I no paper completion, J no external mutation during planning), covering every gate clause exactly once. Each stage is assigned to a single owner and a single STORE-001 store-authority tier with an explicit sync edge, recovery source, evidence kind, and rollback. Authority (A) is a signed company-goal record under David's final authority with the CECCA single-CEO-agent boundary and no self-authorization, written to PostgreSQL canonical (STORE-001 class 1). Task graph (B) decomposes the authorized goal into bounded proof-bearing task rows plus RuVector GNN causal-dependency edges in PostgreSQL (classes 1/2), gated by simulation_required = TRUE. Implementation (C) is isolated COW-branch work whose code enters through the ingestion path Nushell parser -> nu_plugin CodeDB -> redb transient buffer -> envctl embed bridge -> PostgreSQL canonical, with agent thoughts transient in redb (class 3) and merge only on green local-first verification. Proof (D) produces a proof record with SHA-256 identity on canonical PostgreSQL state, bound to a SHAKE256 Cryptographic Witness Chain and guarded by RuVector MinCut, with status 'pass' requiring a populated gate_result. Release (E) is an envctl projection from PostgreSQL (module_path materialization) compiled by Nix to a musl static install-in-place binary carrying SHA-256/source-commit provenance, a derived and disposable tree (class 5). Outcome (F) is a measured operating signal (e.g. db_health status + applied_migrations) with live telemetry buffered in redb (class 3) and settled outcomes flushed forward to PostgreSQL via envctl. Rollback (G) leaves company, repository, and production state unchanged via COW-branch discard, PITR, re-projection, and archived-plan restore, honoring the STORE-001 verified-cutover invariant (no unverified swap, no dual-write). Learning (H) updates SONA/MicroLoRA cognition non-authoritatively in AgentDB (class 4) and promotes a next-action row into PostgreSQL only from proven state (LIFEOS-005), witnessed by a SHAKE256 chain. The no-paper-completion invariant (I) requires concrete recoverable evidence at every stage, and the no-external-mutation invariant (J) keeps the whole flow inside the proof-cell (simulation_required, blocked_paths honored, secrets untouched in the keyring per STORE-001 class 6). A fully grounded reference instance threads all eight stages through the already-proven CodeDB BlobStore PostgreSQL parity cutover (STORE-001 migration_path; ADOPT-001 PgStore parity, SHA-256 identity, envctl export contract, exact-byte materialization; blueprint ingestion and anti-bluffing), so the plan is a real contract rather than a template. The plan is store-aligned with STORE-001 (PostgreSQL sole durable writer; redb/envctl/CodeDB/AgentDB in their intended roles; no second durable writer or silent reclassification). No organizational, repository, CI, or production state was mutated and no live store tier was written; product_execution_performed is false.
